Name: CUSTOM_ATTR_SPEC_PARAM
Description: Defines the available custom weapon attribute types and infusion categories.

Fields.Name: Physical
Fields.Description: Standard physical attribute or infusion type.

Fields.Name: Fire
Fields.Description: Fire elemental attribute or infusion type.

Fields.Name: Magic
Fields.Description: Magic elemental attribute or infusion type.

Fields.Name: Lightning
Fields.Description: Lightning/thunder elemental attribute or infusion type.

Fields.Name: Dark
Fields.Description: Dark elemental attribute or infusion type.

Fields.Name: Poison
Fields.Description: Poison status attribute or infusion type.

Fields.Name: Bleed
Fields.Description: Bleed status attribute or infusion type.

Fields.Name: Raw
Fields.Description: Raw variant of the physical infusion type.

Fields.Name: Enchanted
Fields.Description: Enchanted variant of the physical infusion type.

Fields.Name: Mundane
Fields.Description: Mundane variant of the physical infusion type.
